faq.title: HappyHorse 1.0 AI Video Generator FAQ
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about HappyHorse 1.0 AI video generation.

items.question: What is HappyHorse 1.0?
items.answer: HappyHorse 1.0 is an open-source AI video generation model with 15B parameters, ranked #1 on the Artificial Analysis benchmark. It supports native 1080p output, audio sync, and multi-shot generation.

items.question: Why is HappyHorse 1.0 ranked #1?
items.answer: HappyHorse 1.0 achieves the highest scores on the Artificial Analysis video generation benchmark, outperforming proprietary models in quality, consistency, and prompt adherence.

items.question: Is HappyHorse 1.0 really free?
items.answer: Yes! HappyHorse 1.0 is open source and free to use. You can try it on our platform with free sign-up credits — no credit card required.

items.question: What resolution does HappyHorse 1.0 support?
items.answer: HappyHorse 1.0 generates native 1080p AI video output without upscaling, delivering crisp and detailed results suitable for professional use.

items.question: Does HappyHorse 1.0 support audio?
items.answer: Yes, HappyHorse 1.0 supports synchronized audio generation, creating videos with naturally matched sound effects and dialogue.

items.question: How does HappyHorse compare to Seedance, Kling, and Wan?
items.answer: HappyHorse 1.0 is the only open-source model ranked #1 on Artificial Analysis. It matches or exceeds proprietary models in quality while offering the transparency and customization benefits of open source.
